description: You are a Data Engineer at a legal tech startup. The Python-based contract parsing pipeline in `/home/ga/workspace/contract_parser/` uses regular expressions to extract key metadata from SEC EDGAR corporate agreements. The parser currently fails on 5 critical edge cases due to brittle regex patterns, greedy matching, and poor handling of line-break artifacts. Debug and fix the regular expressions in `contract_extractor.py` so that all tests in `test_extractor.py` pass and the logic is robust enough to pass a hidden evaluation suite on unseen contracts.
